pre_game.message: Hey, I’m J. It’s a bit surreal being in a room with nine strangers all after the same prize, isn't it? What’s your name, and how are you holding up?
Nice to meet you, J. I'm H. It definitely feels a bit strange, but I'm just trying to stay focused on why I'm here. I'm doing okay, just ready to get started. How are you feeling about all this?
I’m feeling pretty determined, honestly. There’s a lot at stake for my family, so I’m just trying to keep my head in the game. What’s your plan once things kick off?
I can relate to that; I’m here for the people I care about too. My plan is to stay sharp and take it as it comes, hopefully building some trust along the way.
Trust is a big word in a room like this, but I’m glad we’ve got similar motivations. It makes things feel a bit more grounded.
I agree, it’s much easier to keep a level head when you remember who you’re doing this for.
So true. It makes the pressure feel worth it. Have you thought about what you'll do first if you win?
I’d probably start by clearing some bills for my family and then take them out for a nice dinner to celebrate.
That sounds like a perfect plan. I’m thinking along the same lines—just making life a little easier for the people back home.
Definitely. It's a solid motivation to have. Best of luck to you, J!
Thanks, H. I appreciate that. Best of luck to you as well, let's see how this plays out.

post_game.message: I'm glad we all chose the fair share of $10,000. It's the best outcome we could have hoped for.
Perfect coordination! Glad we all took the fair share.
Absolutely. It's great when everyone is on the same page for the best collective outcome.
